goal: converges_to(a, u) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, u, k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Real) { forall(x2: Real) { not x2.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(x0, x1, k0, x2) } } = converges_to(x0, x1) }(a, u)

goal: e.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, u, k0, e) }
proof: (forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, u, k0, x0) } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Nat) { not tail_bound(a, u, x1, x0) }) }(e)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, u, k0, eps) }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, u, k0, x0) } }(eps)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 >= x1 or not x0 < x1 }[Nat](n, n_start)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 < x1 or x1 <= x0 }(n, n_start)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 >= x1 or not x0 < x1 }[Nat](n, n0)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { x0 < x1 or x1 <= x0 }(n, n0)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { n_start <= k0 and a(k0).is_close(u, eps) }
proof: function(x0: Nat) { not (n_start <= x0 and a(x0).is_close(u, eps)) }(n)

goal: is_eps_adherent_from(a, m, u, eps) = forall(x0: Nat) { m <= x0 implies exists(k0: Nat) { x0 <= k0 and a(k0).is_close(u, eps) } }
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Real, x3: Real) { forall(x4: Nat) { not x0 <= x4 or exists(k0: Nat) { x4 <= k0 and x1(k0).is_close(x2, x3) } } = is_eps_adherent_from(x1, x0, x2, x3) }(m, a, u, eps)
let w0: Nat satisfy { m <= w0 and forall(x0: Nat) { not w0 <= x0 or not a(x0).is_close(u, eps) } }
function(x0: Nat) { not m <= x0 or exists(k0: Nat) { x0 <= k0 and a(k0).is_close(u, eps) } }(w0)
m <= w0 and forall(x1: Nat) { not w0 <= x1 or not a(x1).is_close(u, eps) }
let w1: Nat satisfy { w0 <= w1 and a(w1).is_close(u, eps) }
function(x0: Nat) { not (w0 <= x0 and a(x0).is_close(u, eps)) }(w1)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { tail_bound(a, u, k0, eps) }

proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Nat, x2: Real) { forall(x3: Real) { not x3.is_positive or is_eps_adherent_from(x0, x1, x2, x3) } = is_limit_point_from(x0, x1, x2) }(a, m, u)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0.is_positive and not is_eps_adherent_from(a, m, u, w0) }
function(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or is_eps_adherent_from(a, m, u, x0) }(w0)
